scenarios.label: Baseline mesocosm
scenarios.hypothesis: Population increase should be positive but constrained by host quality and density.

scenarios.label: Warming pulse
scenarios.hypothesis: Aphid numbers may rise rapidly before the heat pulse increases mortality and alate production.

scenarios.label: Water-stressed host
scenarios.hypothesis: Water stress should lower host quality, increase mortality, and induce more alates.

scenarios.label: Low-nitrogen host
scenarios.hypothesis: Population growth should be slower than the baseline despite similar temperatures.

scenarios.label: Natural enemy incursion
scenarios.hypothesis: Aphid population growth should flatten after the incursion even if host quality remains acceptable.

note: Synthetic class dataset generated by the same deterministic engine as the browser app.
